title: Back in Black
funFacts: This song was written as a tribute to former lead singer [artist:Bon Scott], who died in [date:1980]. The album of the same name was the first to feature [artist:Brian Johnson] as the new lead vocalist. The song's iconic guitar riff was created by [artist:Angus Young] and has become one of the most recognizable in rock music. The song appears on [album:Back in Black].
